title: Automation for copying (not mirroring) columns into another board

posts.author: uhaj (Una Hajderpasic)
posts.cookedHtml:
My suggestion is simple- would make a good use of automation that states

When new item is created, create an item in another board and copy data from columns

Something similar to link/mirroring but to allow that in another board we can manipulate data according to the use of the board and that they are not influenced with info from the parent board.
